zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Griffin於大約1551年2月18日出生在英國瓦維其可爾索利爾時，他的父親Sri. Ralph Griffin21歲，母親Margery Throckmorton19歲。他於1579年4月26日與Elizabeth Wilson在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1582年之後在英國米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Griffin于大约1551年2月18日出生在英国瓦維其可爾索利爾时，他的父亲Sri. Ralph Griffin21岁，母亲Margery Throckmorton19岁。他于1579年4月26日与Elizabeth Wilson在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾考文垂霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1582年之后在英国米德萊可斯特普尼聖 登斯坦 安德 哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Griffin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Gruffin, Griffin, a pet form of Middle Welsh Gruffudd. In the Welsh border counties this name was introduced directly from Welsh, and in the eastern counties of England by Bretons from France who came over with the Norman conquest.
Irish: Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha ‘descendant of Gríobhtha’, a personal name from gríobh ‘gryphon’.

variants.name: Griffee
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffy
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

variants.name: Griffey
meanings: Irish (Clare): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gríobhtha (see Griffin ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Griffin was born about 18 February 1551, in Solihull, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sri. Ralph Griffin, was 21 and his mother, Margery Throckmorton, was 19. He married Elizabeth Wilson on 26 April 1579, in Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1582, in Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Wilson le 26 avril 1579, à Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1582, à Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Griffin è nato il circa 18 febbraio 1551 nel Solihull, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sri. Ralph Griffin, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margery Throckmorton, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wilson il 26 aprile 1579, nel Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1582, nel Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Griffinが約1551年2月18日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアソリハルで生まれた時，父Sri. Ralph Griffinは21歳，母Margery Throckmortonは19歳であった。1579年4月26日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーホーリー トリニトイ チャーチでElizabeth Wilsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1582年以後にイギリスミッドレセックスステプニーサイント ダンスタン アンド アル サインツ チャーチで死去した。

ko.Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Ste: 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치
ko.Holy Trinity, Coventry, Warwick, Warwick: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 홀이 트리니티 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Griffin(이)가 대략 1551년 2월 18일 영국 워윅실르 솔이훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sri. Ralph Griffin(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Throckmorton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1579년 4월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 홀이 트리니티 c후르치에서 Elizabeth Wilson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1582년 이후 영국 미들레세스 스테p니 세인트 던스탠 앤드 앨 세인츠 c후르치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Griffin nasceu aproximadamente 18 de fevereiro de 1551, em Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sri. Ralph Griffin, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margery Throckmorton, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wilson em 26 de abril de 1579, em Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1582, em Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.Holy Trinity, Coventry, Warwick, Warwick: холи тринити чурч, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Griffin родился около 18 февраля 1551 г. в местности солихулл, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sri. Ralph Griffin было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Throckmorton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wilson 26 апреля 1579 г. в местности холи тринити чурч, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1582 г. в местности сеинт дунстань анд алл сеинц чурч, степни, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Griffin nació aproximadamente 18 de febrero de 1551, en Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sri. Ralph Griffin, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margery Throckmorton, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wilson el 26 de abril de 1579, en Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1582, en Saint Dunstan and All Saints Church, Stepney, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
